reviews.comment:
Las mejores medialunas, los mejores mantecados. Todo una delicia.

(Translated by Google)
The best croissants, the best shortbread. Absolutely delicious.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoeGVlX3NnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Una parada, con espacio suficiente para tener mesas al aire libre, y no tienen ni una. Se quedaron en el tiempo
Afuera  hay mucha mugre y la atención del bar es mediocre.
Lo único que se salvan son las facturas y alfajor de maicena.

(Translated by Google)
A roadside stop with enough space for outdoor seating, and they don't have a single table. They're stuck in the past. The place is filthy outside, and the service inside is mediocre. The only decent things are the pastries and cornstarch alfajores.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoaGVIYlRBEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy bueno para parar luego de un tiempo en la ruta. Los baños super limpios y cuenta con un parque atras muy amplio con juegos para niños y donde se pueden llevar mascotas.

(Translated by Google)
A great place to stop after a while on the road. The restrooms are super clean, and there's a large park out back with a playground and where pets are allowed.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoLVkzSGhBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención.. sanitarios en óptimas condiciones..

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. Restrooms in excellent condition.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNobWMzVnVBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Almorzamos la atención buena lastima que ese día hacía mucho calor y el aire no estaba a full.

(Translated by Google)
We had lunch, the service was good, it's a shame that it was very hot that day and the air conditioning wasn't working properly.
